headlines.headline: Crevol Retail Group reports 25% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 25% increase in customer acquisition is a strong indicator of growth and market demand that should positively impact revenue.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods faces regulatory review of supply chain optimization practices

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
